\documentclass{article}
\begin{document}

\section{Introduction}
We report new results on a benchmark of $127$ transitions across $5$ environments.

\section{Method}
We train a 3-layer MLP policy with PPO and GAE-$\lambda$ advantage estimation.
The optimizer is AdamW with a learning rate of $3 \times 10^{-4}$ and batch size 64.

\section{Results}
Our model reaches an accuracy of $87.3\%$ on the held-out test set,
with a final training loss of $0.42$.

\end{document}
